## Tests added or updated

- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/ -q` passes
- [ ] `python -m ruff check .` passes

## Claim hygiene

- [ ] No numbers added to README, docs, or paper without a result artifact on disk
- [ ] Any new claim has an entry with artifact pointer in `docs/02-evidence-and-claims.md`
- [ ] No negative results or caveats removed
